payload.title: Unify / eliminate the dual activation mechanism
payload.description: Today single-file inputs use the inner attribute #![strict] while cargo crates must use trust_attrs::strict!{} because stock rustc rejects #![strict]. This split is a real papercut. With project-level config (sibling story) the cargo case needs no per-file marker at all; this story is the cleanup to land on ONE documented activation story across single-file and cargo modes, and remove or deprecate the redundant path. Coordinate with the config story so we don't ship two half-migrations.
